key_decision: ControlMaster SSH multiplexing instead of passwordless key auth. Authenticate once in terminal (DUO + password), Claude Code reuses the socket for all SSH/rsync commands. Works cleanly with CHPC DUO MFA.
last_completed: Full project scaffold committed to GitHub (36 files): SLURM job templates (train/convert/eval array/poc), rsync sync scripts, Makefile with convenience targets, and a comprehensive .gitignore. Verified the complete local → GitHub → CHPC → GPU → sync-back workflow with a live SLURM job that passed all 7 environment checks on the A800.
next_step: Session 1 — src/data/loader.py, formatter.py, contamination_check.py, and pytest suite.
